title: Flood Risk and Home Values
subtitle: How FEMA Flood Zone Reclassifications Affect Property Markets
author: Cameron Keith
course: Econ 66: Topics in Money and Finance
headline_description: -2.8% decline in home values four or more years after LOMR flood zone reclassification
sample_description: Coastal US zip codes (excluding Alaska and territories), quarterly panel 2009-2022
